network.offline: You are offline. Some features may be unavailable.
network.timeout: Request timed out. Please check your connection and try again.
network.server_unreachable: Server is unreachable. This may be a first-load cold start — please wait a moment.

server.internal: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
server.service_unavailable: Service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
server.bad_gateway: Upstream service failed. Please try again.
server.maintenance: System is under maintenance. Please check back shortly.

auth.unauthorized: You need to sign in to access this feature.
auth.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
auth.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.invalid_credentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
auth.token_expired: Authentication token expired. Please refresh the page.
auth.csrf_mismatch: Security token mismatch. Please refresh and try again.

not_found.resource: The requested resource was not found.
not_found.page: This page could not be found.
not_found.location: Location not found. Please try a different search.

validation.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
validation.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.
validation.invalid_format: Invalid format. Please check your input.
validation.phone_india: Please enter a valid 10-digit Indian phone number.

location.permission_denied: Location permission was denied. Enable GPS in your browser settings.
location.unavailable: GPS location is unavailable. Please try again.
location.timeout: GPS lookup timed out. Please ensure you are outdoors.
location.unsupported: Geolocation is not supported on this device.

sos.no_services: No emergency services found nearby. Call 112.
sos.already_active: An SOS is already active for your session.
sos.queue_offline: SOS queued offline. It will be sent when you reconnect.

chatbot.llm_unavailable: AI assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again.
chatbot.stream_interrupted: Response stream was interrupted. Please retry.
chatbot.no_response: No response from the AI. Please rephrase your question.
chatbot.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please wait a moment.
chatbot.context_too_long: Conversation is too long. Please start a new chat.

upload.file_too_large: File exceeds the maximum upload size.
upload.virus_scan: File failed security scan. Please upload a different file.

challan.calculation_failed: Fine calculation failed. Please try again.
challan.offline_fallback: Using offline fine data — results may not reflect recent changes.

tracking.connection_failed: Failed to connect to tracking service.
tracking.no_updates: No location updates received. Check GPS settings.

report.submit_failed: Failed to submit report. Please try again.
report.photo_required: A photo is required for road issue reports.
report.location_required: GPS location is required to submit a report.
